title: Shadows Stolen on Thriller Bark
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Perona, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Perona, focusing on the immediate stakes of shadows stolen on thriller bark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You know, we might have some problems...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Finding the zombies that have our shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah....!! and really, Luffy's zombie is huge!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even though I want to see mine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And Moria's just up those stairs, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And we'll all get our shadows back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's about to trans- form into something.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah... you were making this earlier. Cool.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You people have no sense of danger,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So I'm telling you right now!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Perona, focusing on the immediate stakes of shadows stolen on thriller bark.
